title: Volila Glass Bottles with Stoppers - 250ml Clip Top Swing Top Bottles for Homebrewing, Beverages, Kombucha, Wine, Vinegar and Oil (6 Pack)
features: 🍺【 Multi Functional 】Crafted from a high-grade soda lime glass, these swing top bottles serve multiple purposes. They are ideal for various beverages and storage bottles for liquid such as juice, kombucha bottles, cooking oils, vinegar, soda, sloe gin, water, milk, beer bottles for home brewing, wine bottles, and smoothies.

🍋【 Brewer's Kit 】 This set of clear glass bottles comes in a pack of 6 with 12 black labels, 1 waterproof pen, 1 funnel, and a cleaning brush. The glass bottles with lids have a 250ml capacity, measuring 19cm in height and 6cm in width. The swing stopper provides airtight, leakproof storage for your homebrew. You can reuse these kombucha jar bottles and clean them in the dishwasher. However, avoid boiling these flip top bottles to prevent breakage.

🍑【 Securely Wrapped 】 We prioritize the safety of your 250ml glass bottles during shipping. Our glass bottle with stopper is meticulously wrapped in bubble wrap packaging with grid lock in between the glasses. The accessories are sealed in an OPP bag within a sturdy double-walled box. Additionally, there's a Fragile warning label printed on all four sides to ensure the safety of your beer bottles.

🍏【 Quick Lock and Seal Design 】The swing-top design enables for quick opening and closing. It's ideal for keeping craft beer and carbonated beverages. The leakproof lid keeps your drinks safe and pleasant even when you're on the go. To open the swing top bottles 250ml, lift the wire up, and to close it, swing the lid down and press it firmly.

🍶【 Warranty 】 At volila, your happiness is our priority. Every purchase of our clear glass bottles with stoppers comes with a 100% warranty. Should you encounter any concerns or issues with this glass juice bottles, don't hesitate to reach out to us. Your peace of mind is our promise!
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Are these swing top bottles suitable for preserving homemade beverages like kombucha or sloe gin? Yes, these swing top bottles are perfect for preserving homemade beverages such as kombucha, sloe gin, oils, and more. Can I use these bottles for storing different types of beverages? Absolutely! These swing top bottles are versatile and can be used for storing a wide range of beverages, including juices, smoothies, flavored water, and milk. The secure seal ensures your drinks stay fresh and flavorful. Are these bottles easy to clean and maintain? Yes, these swing top bottles are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. Additionally, the included cleaning brush makes it simple to clean the bottles by hand, ensuring they're ready for reuse whenever you need them. Do these swing top bottles come with labels for easy organization? Yes, each set of swing top bottles comes with black labels and a waterproof pen, allowing you to label your bottles for easy organization. How can I keep my bottles safe during fermentation? Burp daily, chill early, and use strong, carbonation-safe bottles for a smooth and safe fermentation.
